---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem it solves

What limitation or gap does this address?

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, examples, related issues, or anything else that helps explain the request.
